x-api-key.name: x-api-key
x-api-key.description: API Key required for all endpoints

device.description: Device type to emulate. Defaults to desktop.

proxyCountry.description: Proxy country code to route the request

format.description: Format of the scraped result. Defaults to html.

fileOutput.description: Whether to get response in file format

url.description: The target URL that was scraped

proxyCountry.description: Proxy country used, if any

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the request in milliseconds

data.description: Scraped data (URL or inline content depending on output)

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the request in milliseconds

details.example: The URL must be a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL

value.description: Static value to assign to this field

name.description: Field name in the extracted JSON

selector.description: Selector or XPath to extract value

baseSelector.description: Base selector for scoping extraction (css/xpath only)

device.description: Device type to emulate. Defaults to desktop.

proxyCountry.description: Proxy country code to route the request

format.description: Format(s) of the scraped result. Comma-separated or array. Defaults to html.

fileOutput.description: Whether to get response in file format

stealth.description: Enable stealth mode to bypass basic bot detection (removes webdriver signals, patches navigator properties)

waitTime.description: Seconds to wait after page load before capturing content. Helps bypass lazy-loaded content and bot checks.

extractionSchema.description: Extraction schema (optional in default mode, required in css/xpath)

url.description: The target URL that was scraped

fileOutput.description: Whether to get response in file format

waitTime.description: Seconds to wait after page load before capturing content. Helps bypass lazy-loaded content and bot checks.

extractionSchema.description: Extraction schema (optional in default mode, required in css/xpath)

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the request in milliseconds

data.description: Scraped data (URL or inline content depending on output)

types.description: List of DNS record types to query. If omitted, all supported types will be returned.

url.description: The target URL that was scraped

types.description: List of DNS record types to query. If omitted, all supported types will be returned.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the request in milliseconds

type.description: File type of screenshot. Defaults to png.

pageHeight.description: Height of the page (for partial screenshot)

followRedirect.description: Whether to follow redirects when checking site status

url.description: The target URL checked for broken links

proxyCountry.description: Proxy country used for this request

successful.description: Number of successful links (2xx status codes)

redirects.description: Number of redirect links (3xx status codes)

broken.description: Number of broken links (4xx status codes and DNS/network failures)

serverError.description: Number of server errors (5xx status codes)

url.description: The target URL checked for TLS support

followRedirect.description: Whether to follow redirects when checking site status

Proxy country used for the test

followRedirect.description: Indicates if redirects were followed during the test

ttfb.description: Time to First Byte - calculated as dns+connect+tls+send+wait (ms)

redirectDuration.description: Time spent in redirects before reaching final URL (ms)

protocol.description: The actual HTTP protocol used (e.g. h2, h3, http/1.1, http/1.0)

remoteIp.description: Remote IP address of the server

bytesRead.description: Total bytes read from the response

statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the response

followRedirect.description: Whether to follow redirects when checking site status

Country used for proxy

followRedirect.description: Indicates if redirects should be followed

insecure.description: List of insecure (HTTP) resources found on the page

secure.description: List of secure (HTTPS) resources found on the page

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the request in milliseconds

message.description: Indicates whether mixed content found or not. It can either be "Mixed content(s) found." or "No mixed content found."

meta.description: Metadata about the mixed content test

data.description: Contains either an array of all resources (when no mixed content) or an object with insecure/secure arrays (when mixed content found)

oneOf.description: Simple array of all resources when no mixed content found
Object with insecure and secure arrays when mixed content found

isEnabled.description: Indicates if DNSSEC is enabled for the domain

dnskey.description: List of DNSKEY records if DNSSEC is enabled

rrsig.description: List of RRSIG records if DNSSEC is enabled

followRedirect.description: Indicates if redirects should be followed

hop.description: Hop number in the traceroute path

host.description: Host IP or domain name at this hop

asn.description: Autonomous System Number (ASN) for the host

loss.description: Packet loss percentage at this hop

sent.description: Number of packets sent to this hop

last.description: Last recorded round-trip time (RTT) in milliseconds

meta.description: Metadata about the MTR test execution

data.description: Array of hop details observed in the MTR trace route

url.description: The tested URL or IP address

stdDev.description: Standard deviation of RTT in milliseconds

ip.description: Resolved IP address of the tested domain

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the request in milliseconds

meta.description: Metadata about the Ping test execution
